phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso della tomba, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so del-lah TOM-bah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAHN-toh COS-tah eel bee-lyet-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiudete, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah kyoo-DEH-teh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si compra il ticket, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see KOM-prah eel TICK-et, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, si può visitare la cripta, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see pwoh vee-zee-TAH-reh lah CREEP-tah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is included in the ticket.

responses.english: Yes, it is included in the ticket.
